input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: pre event submissions will be subject to penalties imposed as given in section dr - document

            rule S.2.4.3: Pre event submissions will be subject to penalties imposed as given in section DR - Document
S.2.4.3 Pre event submissions will be subject to penalties imposed as given in section DR - Document 
Requirements.

final_answer: Pre event submissions will be subject to penalties imposed as given in section DR - Document Requirements.
